source: results/screening_full_1M_topological_hashed_native_terminal_bundle (headline 1M run; matches Table S1, the top-ligand figures, and Fig S2)

rank_definitions.screen_rank: Stage-3 cascade-score rank within the screen
rank_definitions.native_score_rank: rank by native weighted coverage only (coarse ties); native_rank in native_rank_comparison.csv (e.g. JVICU=6) - NOT used in the manuscript
rank_definitions.final_native_rank: final lexicographic rank used everywhere: native weighted coverage, then matched features, then fit RMSD, then mean pair-distance error (e.g. JVICU=18)
